hypothesis: If a multi-agent LLM-based framework with dedicated Research and Experiment Setup agents is given access to force field libraries, RASPA examples, and literature search tools, then it will reproducibly extract complete and correct force field parameters from publications and automatically generate RASPA-compatible adsorption simulation inputs that execute successfully and reproduce published adsorption isotherms and heats of adsorption across single/multiple adsorbates and up to 500 zeolite structures.
